findings.title: Sanitize SVG rendering to prevent XSS
findings.what: Install dompurify and wrap dangerouslySetInnerHTML at line ~285 with DOMPurify.sanitize() before rendering AI-generated SVG content
findings.why: AI-generated SVG is rendered raw via dangerouslySetInnerHTML — any injected script tags execute in the user's browser

findings.title: Add missing requests dependency
findings.what: Add requests==2.31.0 to requirements.txt — youtube_service_rapidapi.py imports it but it's not listed
findings.why: YouTube transcript extraction will crash at runtime with ImportError. Alternatively, refactor to use httpx which is already installed

findings.title: Fix bare except in main.py startup
findings.what: Change bare except: at line 83 to except Exception: so SystemExit and KeyboardInterrupt propagate correctly
findings.why: Bare except catches SystemExit/KeyboardInterrupt, preventing graceful Docker container shutdown and interfering with SIGTERM handling

findings.title: Add security headers to Next.js config
findings.what: next.config.ts is effectively empty. Add poweredByHeader: false and security headers (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy). Backend has these via nginx but the Vercel frontend does not
findings.why: Frontend on Vercel exposes Next.js version header and lacks standard security headers that nginx provides for the backend

findings.title: Delete dead backend files
findings.what: Remove 6 unused files: simple_main.py (test server), queries_broken.py (broken copy), mutations_full.py (duplicate), test_argon2.py (one-off test), and two stale requirements files
findings.why: Dead code confuses contributors and inflates Docker build context (no .dockerignore exists either). These files are not imported anywhere

findings.title: Replace print() with structured logging
findings.what: Replace ~14 print() calls across main.py (5) and ai_service.py (9) with Python logging module using structured format and appropriate log levels
findings.why: print() output in Docker has no timestamps, log levels, or filtering. Production debugging requires grepping raw stdout instead of using log management tools

findings.title: Add backend input validation for auth and chat
findings.what: Add Strawberry/Pydantic validators: min 8 char passwords in RegisterInput, email format validation, max_length on chat messages (10K chars), size cap on base64 image_data (10MB per image)
findings.why: Frontend validates 6-char passwords but backend accepts anything. No message size limits means a single request can send unbounded data through the AI pipeline, exhausting quotas or causing OOM
